citations.narrative:
In the holding enclosure to which the red ruffed lemur has access at the cafe there is a net hammock that is badly worn
and frayed along the edge near the cage door, producing numerous strands of material several inches long.
Damaged enrichment can result in injury to non-human primates from entrapment or ingestion. The facility must ensure
that all surfaces are maintained on a regular basis and that objects within the facility are replaced when worn or soiled to
protect the animals from illness or injury.
Correct by February 17, 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives.
Additional Inspectors:
E RODRIGUEZ, VETERINARY MEDICAL OFFICER n

narrative:
3.75(c)(2) 
   
Housing facilities, general. 
In the holding enclosure to which the red ruffed lemur has access at the cafe there is a net hammock that is badly worn 
and frayed along the edge near the cage door, producing numerous strands of material several inches long. 
Damaged enrichment can result in injury to non-human primates from entrapment or ingestion. The facility must ensure 
that all surfaces are maintained on a regular basis and that objects within the facility are replaced when worn or soiled to 
protect the animals from illness or injury. 
Correct by February 17, 2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives. 
 
Additional Inspectors: 
E RODRIGUEZ, VETERINARY MEDICAL OFFICER n
